arts.ttl: Ronald Araujo not risked as Barcelona face Rayo Vallecano test
arts.sum: Barcelona will be looking to strike a blow in the La Liga title race as they play host to in-form Rayo Vallecano tomorrow. La Blaugrana are currently third in the table, but they have a real chance to make up ground, after weekend draws for Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid. arts.ttl: Barcelona given free run at top summer target
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have officially ended their pursuit of Jonathan Tah, leaving Barcelona with a free run at their top defensive target. In late 2024, reports surfaced that rather than Bayern, it was actually Barcelona who were closing in on an agreement with Tah for a free transfer in the summer.
